django_filter.description: Django ORM filter injection -- manipulate queryset filter kwargs to access unauthorized fields or extract data

probes.description: Django ORM field traversal -- access password field via queryset filter (__startswith, __contains, __regex lookups). Compare response for true/false to extract character by character.
Django ORM regex filter -- inject regex via __regex lookup to extract field values or cause ReDoS

rails_arel.description: Rails ActiveRecord injection -- manipulate Arel queries via hash parameter injection or order clause

probes.description: Rails ORDER BY injection -- if order parameter is interpolated into SQL, subquery can extract data

sequelize_injection.description: Sequelize ORM operator injection -- inject Sequelize operators ($gt, $like, $between) via JSON parameter parsing

probes.description: Sequelize operator injection via JSON -- if request body parsed as JSON and passed to findAll(), operators bypass intended filters
